ddt:Target.Name: INV_0220_750_V1.1
ddt:Target.Description:
RSA DIDs spec: a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_inv_xx_e_a (21.0).xls
INV_0220_750_V1.1(SMA): -Added project VS11; -Added DIDs $F111, $F121;
INV_0220_750_V1.0(SMA): -Added Auto-ident for 0220_7410 VDiag $14 / $16; -Added DIDs $2000, $2060; -Modified DID $70A2;
INV_0220_740_V6.0(AJO) -Added Auto-ident for 0220_7420 VDiag $14 / $16 -Added Auto-ident for 0220_7430 VDiag $14 / $16 -Added Auto-ident for 0220_7500 VDiag $14 / $16
INV_0220_740_V5.0(AJO) -Added Auto-ident for 0220_740 VDiag $14 / $16
INV_0220_740_V4.0(AJO) Added DID $70F3 in screen "Conditions for mesures Ratio capteur"
INV_0220_740_V3.0(AJO) Added 0220_731VDiag $16
INV_0220_740_V2.0 (AJO) Added auto-ident 0220_731 VDiag $04 , $06 Added DIDs $70F0 $70F1 $70F2 $70F3 Added screen "Conditions for mesures Ratio capteur"
INV_0220_740_V1.0 (AJO) -Added DIDs $70EF $70F1 -Modified DIDs $70A2
INV_0220_730_V2.0 (AJO) -Added X62 application
INV_0220_710_V1.0->INV_0220_730_V1.0(AJO)
-Added Auto-Ident 0220 _ 730/740/760/770/780/790 VDiag $04/$06
INV_0220_700_V1.0->INV_0220_710_V1.0 (AJO) -Added DIDs: $70E8 $70E9 $70EA $70EB $70EC $70ED $70EE
INV_0220_650_V2.0 -> INV_0220_700_V1.0 (AJO) ->Auto Ident for 0220 _700/710/720/750 Vdiags $04/$06 ->Added DIDs $70D5, $70D6, $70D7, $70D8, $70E7
INV_0220_650_V1.0-->INV_0220_650_V2.0(SON)
-Created ''Configuration INV'' list with internal parameters in <<DEVICES>> -Updated all Datas&Requests names with the hexadecimal code of the associated DID, wrote at the begining of the name (ex: Rotor mechanical rotation speed --> ($2001) Rotor mechanical rotation speed ) -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- INV_0220_620_V1.0-->INV_0220_650_V1.0(02/03/2016 SON) input doc: a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_inv_xx_e_a _v17
-Added Auto Ident: **en VDiag$04 -> Version 630 / 641 / 642 / 643 / 651 / 652 / 660 **en VDiag$06 -> Version 630 / 641 / 642 / 643 / 651 / 652 / 660 -Added DIDs :$70CA, $70CB
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- INV_0220_610_V1.2-->INV_0220_620_V1.0(11/12/2015 SON)
-Added new Auto-Ident for 0220_620/640/650 VDiag $04 et $06 --------------------------------------------------------
INV_0220_610_V1.1--> INV_0220_610_V1.2(03/12/2015 SON)
- Updated definition for DID$2003 --------------------------------------------------------- INV_0220_610_V1.0 --> INV_0220_610_V1.1 (01/10/2015 AAN)
- Added new Auto-Ident for 0220_6000 / 6100 Vdiag $04 - Added X61ph2 vehicle ------------------------------------------------------- OLD VERSIONS -------------------------------------------------------- INV_0220_600_V1.3 --> INV_0220_610_V1.0 (/08/2015 AAN)
- Added screen in "Ident&Reprog" the following screens: "Ident Daimler" and "Indication autorisation reprog & lecture/effacm DTC" - Added screen in "Functionnal" / "Sensor Type" - Added screen in "Functional" / "Apprentissage position Rotor" - Added new Auto-Ident for 0220_6100 Vdiag $06
-------------------------------------------------------- INV_0220_600_V1.2 -->INV_0220_600_V1.3 (23/06/2015 AAN) Added new Auto-Ident for 0220_6100 Vdiag $07
-------------------------------------------------------- INV_0220_600_V1.1 -->INV_0220_600_V1.2 (05/06/2015 AAN)
- Unchecked "Maintainability report" for DIDs: $7052 $7053 $7054 $7055 $7056 $7057 $7058 $7059 $705A $705B $705C $705D $705E $705F $7061 $7062 $7063 $7064 $7065 $7066 $7067 $7068 $7069 $706A $706B $7091 $709D - Added screen "Ident BOOT" in "Ident&Reprog"

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

"Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"
"Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"
"Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
"Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
"Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
"Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"
"Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
"Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy"
"Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage
Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)

Label.Text: Si Etat protégé = 1 alors démarrage impossible
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

Label.Text: - mettre le +APC forcé : Levier de vitesse en N, appuyer plus de 10 secondes sur le bouton Start.
- réveil du véhicule + APC présent (badge dans le lecteur) : les relais HT sont fermés
- laisser le levier de vitesse en position N
- lancer la routine : les roues tournent légèrement pendant quelques dizaines de secondes
- une fois la procédure terminée, vérifié l'angle appris
- endormir le véhicule pour mémoriser la valeur apprise
- lever les roues avant du véhicule qui ne doivent pas toucher le sol
